sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'W', 'B', 'c'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} px={n['pixels']} center=({sum(rows)//len(rows)},{sum(cols)//len(cols)}) children={n['children']}")

# Check ASCII
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nCurrent state:")
for i in range(28, 38):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {lines[i][8:20]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
